backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Disease and Medicine types, storing a map of diseases, and exposing initialize, getAllDiseases, and getDisease query/update methods with two seeded entries (Diabetes and Hypertension).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the Calculator page feature to its implementation files (App.tsx, Layout.tsx, useCalculator.ts, Calculator.tsx) and associated test ID REQ-10.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries for every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes using OKLCH values, covering background, foreground, card, primary, chart, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the MediFind PWA that captures the beforeinstallprompt event before React mounts, registers the service worker on load, and mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/public/manifest.json: Web App Manifest for MediFind defining app name, standalone display mode, theme colors, and four icon entries (192px and 512px, each with separate 'any' and 'maskable' purpose entries).
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker (cache version medifind-v2) that pre-caches the root URL on install, clears old caches on activate, and serves cached responses as a fallback for failed GET requests.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing navigation state across three pages (Disease Directory, Pharmacy Finder, Calculator), rendering them inside the Layout shell and scrolling to top on page change.
frontend/src/components/DiseaseCard.tsx: Compact card component that displays a disease's icon, name, truncated description, and medicine count badge, with visual highlight styling when selected.
frontend/src/components/DiseaseDetail.ts: Detail panel component showing a disease's full description, a numbered list of medicines with dosage notes, and an amber medical disclaimer notice, with a close button.
frontend/src/components/InstallPrompt.ts: Renders a dismissible banner prompting users to install the MediFind PWA, with separate flows for iOS (manual share instructions) and other browsers (native install prompt).
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the app shell with a sticky header, desktop and mobile navigation between the three pages (diseases, pharmacy, calculator), an install prompt banner, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/PharmacyCard.tsx: Displays a single pharmacy's details (name, address, phone, hours, distance) in a card, highlighting the nearest result with a special badge and ring style.
frontend/src/data/pharmacies.ts: Defines the Pharmacy interface and exports a static list of 12 sample pharmacies with coordinates, addresses, phone numbers, and hours across the New York City area.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCalculator.ts: Custom hook implementing a standard calculator's state machine, exposing handlers for digit input, decimal, operators, equals, clear, sign toggle, and percentage.
frontend/src/hooks/useGeolocation.ts: Custom hook that wraps the browser Geolocation API, providing requestLocation and reset callbacks along with lat/lng, loading, error, and hasLocation state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInstallPrompt.ts: Custom hook that captures the beforeinstallprompt event (including one stored on window before React mounts), detects iOS and standalone mode, and exposes promptInstall and dismiss actions with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all diseases, a single disease, and initializing the disease dataset via the backend actor. Cache invalidation is triggered on successful initialization.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines a medical-green OKLCH color theme with CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes. Also includes utility classes for hero gradients, card hover effects, and medicine badges.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/pages/Calculator.tsx: A standard arithmetic calculator UI page built with a `useCalculator` hook, rendering a styled button grid with digit, operator, action, and equals button variants.
frontend/src/pages/DiseaseDirectory.tsx: A searchable disease directory page that fetches diseases from the backend, auto-initializes if empty, and displays filterable disease cards with a detail view on selection.
frontend/src/pages/PharmacyFinder.tsx: A pharmacy finder page that uses geolocation to sort and display nearby pharmacies from a static dataset by distance using the Haversine formula.
frontend/src/utils/haversine.ts: Utility module implementing the Haversine formula to calculate the distance in kilometers between two geographic coordinates, plus a helper to format distances as meters or kilometers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the MediFind frontend, extending the default theme with custom colors (using oklch CSS variables), fonts, border radii, shadows, and keyframe animations, plus plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the MediFind health app project at schema version 1.0.0, including existing features (disease directory, pharmacy finder, PWA manifest, theming), known issues (PWA install prompt), architectural notes, and versioned feature/requirement metadata.
